title: White House accuses Moonshot AI of distilling Anthropic tech for K3
summary: US officials warn that Chinese firms conducting covert, industrial-scale AI distillation could face sanctions and export restrictions.

title: SEC settles Coinbase suit over ‘text messages that disappeared’
summary: The settlement follows a watchdog report last year that blamed “avoidable errors” for the loss of nearly a year’s worth of Gary Gensler’s text messages.

title: Asian Shares Rise on Chipmakers, Brent Tops $96: Markets Wrap
summary: Asian shares rose as regional chipmakers climbed on expectations they will benefit from billions of dollars flowing into the artificial intelligence buildout. Oil extended its recent rally.

title: Crop Prices Hit 3-Year High as Black Sea Attacks, Heat Stoke Food Inflation
summary: Crop prices rose to a three-year high as heat waves and escalating attacks in the Black Sea threaten to disrupt global grain trade, reviving risks to food inflation that have also been stoked by the war in Iran.

title: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
summary: The company's "Everything Exchange" is heading north. No launch date set yet, but the Coinbase Canada CEO says phase two for the company is in motion.

title: Kraken Parent Company Makes Moves to Offer xStocks From Global Markets
summary: Payward and fintech GTN are teaming up to bring xStocks—blockchain-based copies of real company shares—to Hong Kong, the UK, Europe, and South Korea.

title: South Korea’s Mirae Asset completes acquisition of Korbit crypto exchange
summary: Mirae Asset also plans to increase its stake from 92.06% to 97.15% through an additional deal later this week, local media reported.

title: Arbitrum protocol AFX Trade hit by $24 million bridge exploit: Blockaid
summary: PeckShield flagged that the attacker bridged the stolen funds from Arbitrum to Ethereum and swapped them for 12,467 ETH.

title: Google burns through $6bn in cash as AI spending climbs again
summary: Search giant says it will commit up to $205bn to AI investments in 2026

title: Tesla’s profits plunge as Musk’s carmaker uses discounts to boost sales
summary: Capital expenditures more than doubled as company accelerates pivot to AI and robots
